meta.title: DEF CON Safe Mode Payment Village - Arkadiy Litvinenko - Online Banking Security
meta.description: Competition between banks leads to new opportunities for clients, which are the cause of new risks for the banks and for the clients themselves. During the talk we will discuss the internals of Online and Mobile banking, what vulnerabilities are common or specific for these services and what best practices exist for solving these problems.
